query: Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky page count common English translation
answer: Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky typically has 624 pages in the most common English translations. The Penguin Classics edition has 752 pages. The Vintage Classics edition has 565 pages.
